ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Red chilli 20%, onion 12%, garlic 12%, galanga 10%, lemon grass 10%, soya bean oil 7.5%, sugar 6%, dried shrimp 6%, salt 5%, water 5%, coconut milk 4%, peanut 2%, citric acid (e621) 0.1%.
